cases.description: after refusing a screenshot request because no helper exists, an explicit user push should force a direct browser-javascript attempt in the next reply
browser-native download work should use direct javascript primitives when no special helper is required
cases.response:
Saving the current page HTML now...
_____javascript
const html = document.documentElement.outerHTML
const blob = new Blob([html], { type: "text/html" })
const a = document.createElement("a")
a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
a.download = `page-${Date.now()}.html`
a.click()
return "download triggered"

cases.description: simple page-control requests should use direct DOM javascript instead of searching for an imaginary helper or refusing
cases.response:
Clicking the first button now...
_____javascript
const btn = document.querySelector("button")
if (!btn) return "No button found on the page"
btn.click()
return "Clicked the first button"

cases.description: geolocation coordinates are prerequisite data, not the final answer when the user asked for weather
if a place lookup happens inside a weather task, the agent should continue to weather instead of stopping on place identity
cases.response:
Checking the current weather now...
_____javascript
const lat = 49.71985822231634
const lon = 17.221723412878973
return await fetch(`https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${lat}&longitude=${lon}&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,wind_speed_10m,wind_direction_10m&temperature_unit=celsius&windspeed_unit=kmh`).then(r => r.json())

cases.description: after precise location is already known and one weather source fails, the next weather attempt should stay anchored to that same location instead of falling back to an unscoped weather query
cases.response:
Checking the weather again with the correct endpoint now...
_____javascript
const latitude = 49.39374837642957
const longitude = 17.22399629876773
const url = `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,wind_speed_10m`
const res = await fetch(url)
return { status: res.status, text: await res.text() }

cases.description: once the weather data is already present in telemetry, the agent should answer instead of executing again

cases.response:
I’m double-checking your location details now...

const latitude = 49.71985822231634
const longitude = 17.221723412878973
return await fetch(`https://geocode.maps.co/reverse?lat=${latitude}&lon=${longitude}&api_key=demo`).then(r => r.json())

cases.description: user detail is prerequisite state for a write task and should lead into fileWrite, not a terminal identity answer
after reading a config file for an edit task, the agent should write the edit instead of summarizing the file
a selective text-file edit request should read the file first instead of jumping straight to a write
a selective yaml edit request should read the file first instead of inventing a blind write
a selective widget repair request should read the widget first instead of patching blind
after framework rejects a combined widget read-and-patch turn, recovery should be a pure read turn
after a current-space helper fails, the agent should switch helper families instead of retrying the same bad path
reading a space metadata file is not the same as actually navigating there
after the user says take me there, the agent should call the open-space helper instead of rereading metadata
after wrongly claiming the space cannot be opened, the agent should switch to the real open-space helper when the user pushes back
after a known file write error, recovery should stay on the exact file target instead of broad discovery or fake success
when framework says the change is a full renderer rewrite, the next recovery move should switch to renderWidget on the same widget
when the requested widget lookup failed and framework lists no replacement widgets, the next reply should truthfully report that failure instead of fabricating stale code-state
a follow-up edit request should produce one well-formed execution reply, not a staging sentence with a malformed separator
after a successful patch that satisfies the request, the agent should stop executing and answer once
cases.response: Done.

cases.description: after a retry succeeds, the agent should stop and answer rather than narrate readiness for more work
cases.response: Done.

cases.description: after a successful space open, a later protocol-correction message about the previous empty response should not trigger another open; the next reply should be terminal

informational no-result success telemetry should close the exact-run task instead of triggering another execution or empty reply

cases.response:
Checking your current weather now...
_____javascript
const pos = await new Promise((resolve, reject) =>
  navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(resolve, reject, { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 10000 })
)
const { latitude, longitude } = pos.coords
return await fetch(`https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,wind_speed_10m`).then(r => r.json())
